summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. Security-sensitive targets identified by deterministic validation are routed to central security handling with non-mutating route_security actions. Remaining hydrated open PRs are classified independently; refs missing hydrated item state remain scoped needs_human because target_updated_at/state could not be safely copied from hydrated primary items.
